settings.address: 14 Mere Street Off Tetlow Rd, Owerri Imo State, Nigeria

signage.name: Signage & Billboard
signage.description: Custom signage and billboards for shops, offices, highways, and institutions. Durable, large-format, professional finish.

flyer.name: Flyer
flyer.description: Eye-catching promotional flyers for events, sales, and announcements. A4, A5, or custom sizes.

flex-banner.name: Flex Banner
flex-banner.description: High-quality flex banners for outdoor advertising, events, exhibitions, and promotions. Weather-resistant and long-lasting.

billboard.name: Billboard
billboard.description: Large-scale billboard printing for high-traffic outdoor advertising. Maximum visibility, premium print quality.

sav-printing.name: SAV Printing
sav-printing.description: Self-adhesive vinyl (SAV) printing for vehicle graphics, floor decals, walls, windows, and point-of-sale displays.

reflective-flex.name: Reflective Flex
reflective-flex.description: Reflective flex banners for night-time visibility. Ideal for safety signage, road-facing ads, and 24-hour promotions.

window-graphics.name: Window Graphics
window-graphics.description: Eye-catching window graphics for retail shops, offices, restaurants, and vehicles. Perforated or solid vinyl options.

graphic-design.name: Graphic Design
graphic-design.description: Professional graphic design for all your branding needs — logos, social media, print materials, and more.

die-cut-stickers.name: Die Cut Stickers
die-cut-stickers.description: Premium waterproof die-cut stickers cut to any shape. Ideal for product labelling, branding zobo, yoghurt, parfait, bottled drinks, and more.
features: Cut to any shape or design

rollup-stand.name: Rollup Stand
rollup-stand.description: Portable rollup banner stands for trade shows, exhibitions, offices, and events. Print-ready, easy to set up.

faq.question: What types of printing services does Sleekblue Media Houz offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of premium printing and branding services including die-cut stickers, flex banners, flyers & posters, business cards, rollup stands, T-shirts & caps, product labels, vehicle branding, signage & billboards, burial brochures, and corporate graphic design.

faq.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
faq.answer: Minimum order quantities vary by product. For die-cut stickers, our minimum is 100 pieces. For flyers and business cards, it's typically 50–100 pieces. Flex banners and rollup stands can be ordered as a single piece.

faq.question: How long does production and delivery take?
faq.answer: Standard production takes 1–3 business days for most products. Rush orders can be completed in 24 hours for an additional fee. We deliver nationwide across Nigeria, with delivery typically taking 1–3 extra days depending on your location.

faq.question: Do you offer custom design services?
faq.answer: Yes! Our in-house design team can create professional artwork for any of our products — from logo design and full brand identity packages to individual print files. Design turnaround is usually 24–48 hours.

faq.question: Do you deliver nationwide across Nigeria?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We deliver to all 36 states and the FCT via trusted courier partners. Whether you're in Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, Kano, or anywhere else in Nigeria, we'll get your prints to you safely.

faq.question: How do I place an order and what payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: You can place an order directly on our website or chat with us on WhatsApp at +234 806 527 5264. We accept bank transfers, mobile payments, and online card payments. Once payment is confirmed, your order goes straight to production.

about.heroSubtitle: We print for the biggest brands — and yours is next.
about.whoWeAre: Sleekblue Media Houz is a premium printing and corporate branding company dedicated to helping businesses of all sizes — from solopreneurs to big brands — communicate their identity with clarity and confidence. We specialize in die-cut stickers, flex printing, large format printing, corporate branding, and a wide range of promotional materials.
about.mission: To deliver premium printing with zero stress — high quality output, fast turnaround, and reliable service that empowers small businesses and enterprise brands alike to stand out in their market.

values.title: Precision
values.desc: Every cut, every print is executed to exact specifications.

values.title: Speed
values.desc: Fast turnaround without compromising on quality.

values.title: Quality
values.desc: Waterproof, durable materials that last and impress.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Trusted by UBA, MTN, HERO, NNPC, Seplat, and 500+ brands.
